title: Tribal Member Youth Invited To Apply For Board, Commission & Committee Seats
summary: The Tribal Council is currently accepting letters of interest from Kenaitze Youth Tribal Members for upcoming youth vacancies on some of the Tribe’s Boards, Commissions and Committees. In general, Boards, Commissions and Committees meet on a monthly basis and provide advisory recommendations for Tribal Council’s consideration regarding each of their respective areas. Attached please find a summary of all the responsibilities, duties, and youth term limits for the Board, Commission or...

title: USDA invites ag producers to respond online to the 2022 Census of Agriculture
summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) mailed survey codes to all known agriculture producers across the 50 states with an invitation to respond online to the 2022 Census of Agriculture at agcounts.usda.gov.
